title: 山中与幽人对酌
author: 李白
translatedTitle: Drinking in the Mountains with a Recluse
translatedText: Mountain flowers bloom while the two of us drink,
One cup, then another, and another again.
I am drunk and wish to sleep, so go for now,
Come tomorrow with your qin if the mood returns.
translatorNote: A casual, intimate scene that feels effortless and expansive at once.
imagePrompt: mountain flowers blooming beside a low table with wine cups, intimate poetic gathering, early spring mountain air, elegant Chinese scene

title: A Light exists in Spring
author: Emily Dickinson
translatedText: 在一年里别的时候并不存在，
当三月还只是刚刚来到。
translatorNote: Dickinson isolates a season into a quality of light that almost cannot be kept.
imagePrompt: delicate early spring light over pale fields, quiet March air, luminous subtle atmosphere, editorial photography
